paper_title: EgoBlind: Towards Egocentric Visual Assistance for the Blind
failure_detail: Code has dependencies (, PIL, accelerate, apex, ast, asyncio, av, base64, bisect, bitsandbytes (+69 more)) but no requirements file; env-like files found at unexpected paths: finetune/llava_ov/environment.yml, finetune/internvl/environment.yml, finetune/qwenvl/environment.yml
